description_long: This object is a classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and a long, slender metal barrel. The stock is a rich brown color, extending from the butt to the fore-end, and features a smooth, slightly contoured surface for comfortable shoulder placement. The barrel and receiver are matte black, with visible iron sights mounted at the front and rear for aiming. The trigger guard and magazine area are integrated into the lower receiver, with the magazine appearing to be internal and flush with the stock. The bolt handle is visible on the right side, indicating manual cycling of the action. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for use in urban or rural environments.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and matte black barrel, featuring iron sights and an internal magazine. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a smooth, contoured stock.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the front sight post.
description_view_1: The rifle is viewed from the right side, displaying the full length of the wooden stock, barrel, bolt handle, and trigger guard.
description_view_2: The rifle is seen from the rear, highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel and iron sights.
description_view_3: The rifle is viewed from the left side, showing the wooden stock, barrel, and the absence of a visible bolt handle on this side.
